content_body:
7M Family Farms is a family owned operation combining naturally grown open-field farming, greenhouse and hydroponic operations to produce a year-round bounty of pesticide-free naturally grown vegetables, fruits, and free range eggs to our awesome customers and restaurants.

Be sure to eat the best food ever at The Cafe at 7M Family Farms - menu created daily. The Farm Store is open year round and a local favorite in the North GA Mountains. Be sure to make time for this experience!
title: 7M Family Farms
